normalization_point: Early Stage 3 capture requires evidence, price path, and RedTeam alignment.
Strong Stage 2 evidence is not Green until cash-flow conversion appears.
Real price rally can be evidence of attention, not Stage 3 proof.
Good structure can become 4B when price and narrative run ahead.
Cycle wins can be real but are not automatically structural rerating.
Media report, MOU, LOI, or non-binding evidence cannot create Stage 3.
Private assets and holdco value are Stage 2 until listed EPS/FCF linkage is visible.
Operational trust breaks outrank demand recovery or sector score.
Legal and governance overhangs cap Green even in strong sectors.
Policy and market shocks adjust valuation room across candidates; they are not company evidence.
